---
title: CHAOSS Weekly Newsletter
author:
  - CHAOSS Community
type: post
date: 2019-07-25T20:17:03+00:00
excerpt: 'Regarding GrimoireLab, Over the last week, the most activity in GrimoireLab was related to improve KingArthur, the retrieval data scheduler. Version 0.1.16 of this component was released which includes several features: user-defined queues to run tasks, tasks lifetimes, custom event handlers and a better REST API to get information about tasks and jobs. Among other activity in GrimoireLab, some critical bugs were fixed, especially the ones related to GitLab merge request retrieval [perceval/#53] and Jira analysis [grimoire-elk/#656].'
url: /chaoss-weekly-newsletter-2-3/
nectar_blog_post_view_count:
  - 2576
ppma_authors_name:
  - CHAOSS Community
categories:
  - News

---
